$schema: Interaction sequence for driving VM installation.

$actions.delay: Wait a fixed number of seconds. Parameters: seconds (number).
$actions.key: Send a single keystroke. Parameters: name (string). Supported: Enter, Tab, Space, Escape, Up, Down, Left, Right, F1-F12.
$actions.type: Type a text string. Parameters: text (string), sensitive (boolean, masks output), charDelayMs (number, delay between chars in ms, default 50).
$actions.typeAndEnter: Type a text string, wait, then press Enter. Parameters: text (string), sensitive (boolean, masks output), charDelayMs (number, default 50), delaySeconds (number, default 2).
$actions.screenshot: Capture a screenshot for debugging. Parameters: label (string, used in filename).
$actions.waitForText: Capture + OCR the VM screen until pattern appears. Parameters: pattern (string), timeoutSeconds (number), pollSeconds (number), freshMatch (boolean, waits for pattern to clear first if already on screen). Uses ${var} substitution.
$actions.waitForAndEnter: Wait for text pattern on screen via OCR, then type a string and press Enter. Parameters: pattern (string), timeoutSeconds (number), pollSeconds (number), freshMatch (boolean), text (string), sensitive (boolean), charDelayMs (number, default 50), delaySeconds (number, default 2), tabCount (number, Tab presses before typing to navigate focus, default 0).
$actions.waitForAndClickButton: Wait for a button label to appear on the VM screen via OCR, then click at the label's centre. Parameters: label (string or string-array of candidate labels), timeoutSeconds (number, default 120), pollSeconds (number, default 5), offsetX (number, default 0), offsetY (number, default 0).
$actions.waitForPort: Wait until a TCP port responds on the VM. Parameters: port (number), timeoutSeconds (number).
$actions.waitForHeartbeat: Wait for Hyper-V Integration Services heartbeat. Parameters: timeoutSeconds (number). Hyper-V only.
$actions.waitForVMStop: Wait until the VM reaches the Off/stopped state. Parameters: timeoutSeconds (number).
$actions.fetchAndExecute: Type a command + Enter, then wait for a completion pattern (freshMatch). Parameters: text (string), description (string), charDelayMs (number), delaySeconds (number, default 2), waitPattern (string), waitTimeoutSeconds (number, default 900), waitPollSeconds (number, default 9).

$variables: Define defaults below. ${vmName}, ${hostType}, ${guestKey} are built-in. Use ${varName} in step parameters.
description: Ubuntu Server (with ubuntu-desktop): dismiss GRUB, wait for unattended autoinstall + reboot + GDM, complete first login. No Install-button click — subiquity runs hands-off via autoinstall's interactive-sections:[].

steps.description: Dismiss the Ubuntu Server live-ISO GRUB menu — pressing Enter boots the default entry and autoinstall takes over (no UI confirmation needed, unlike the Desktop ISO).
Wait for subiquity to finish (including the ubuntu-desktop download via squid-cache, ~2GB) + reboot + GDM login screen.
passwd --expire forced this dialog — re-enter current password
Wait for the auto-opened gnome-terminal shell prompt. CAREFUL: the same string is also the window title, so OCR can false-match — tune pollSeconds if needed.
Reuse the desktop update script — ubuntu-desktop is the same package regardless of whether it came from the Desktop ISO or ubuntu-desktop-on-server.
Reboot so the next sequence starts from a clean GDM state.
